P1 factual/conservative-copy failure in TH articles: manual browser/source review found exaggerated or unsupported product claims that violate the FoneClaw positioning rules. Representative comp_vs_miclaw claims include: “FoneClaw ใช้แทน Samsung Bixby ได้…ทุกฟีเจอร์”, “ไม่มีค่าสมาชิกรายเดือน/ไม่มีค่าใช้จ่ายแอบแฝง/เข้าถึงฟีเจอร์ทั้งหมด”, “ไม่ส่งข้อมูลไปคลาวด์”, “ปลอดภัยกว่า”, “ระบบเรียนรู้พฤติกรรมผู้ใช้”. These should be rewritten conservatively as core features currently free, Android 9+ support, root-free where applicable, permissions by feature, and no unverified superiority/privacy/performance claims.

Additional risky TH claim scan hits: gemini-intelligence-supported-devices says Android tablets/devices are supported “ทุกรุ่น”; wwdc article says Apple often charges extra and FoneClaw has no monthly fee/hidden cost; gemini-vs-foneclaw says no hidden cost; voice-control-whatsapp says voice control while driving is “ปลอดภัยกว่า” and system “ทำให้ทันที”; gemini-vs-siri says FoneClaw is the best-value choice for every Thai user. These are real reader-facing issues, not script false positives.

Next build pass: clean TH article source (th_article_rewrites.py and any batch sources if retained) for conservative factual copy, remove unsupported claims about replacing every feature, all features/free forever/no hidden fees, cloud/privacy superiority, learning user behavior, guaranteed device coverage, fastest/best/safer claims; rebuild in order and return TH to ready_for_codex_qa.
